message:
fix(actor): restore checkpoint().is_err() assertion lost during cancel migration

The cancel migration (18194e5d) accidentally inverted the actor
test assertion at line 1827: checkpoint().is_err() became
is_cancel_requested(), losing verification that checkpoint()
correctly reports cancellation after stop_self().

Also records 8-file peer review of cancel migration, scheduler
hardening, and I/O checkpoint additions (all SOUND).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
